subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from before the Self-Subsisting unto those who possess understanding. Are they who have turned away possessed of aught? Nay, by thy Lord, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی القیوم لقوم یعلمون هل الذین اعرضوا علی شیء لا وربک المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @personal instructions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Word of God is its own standard, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
